register.title: Gadzira account
register.subtitle: Pinda ruzivo rwako kuti utange
register.successMessage: Ndinokutendai nekunyoresa. Kuti ushandise account yako, ndapota tarisa email yako uye tinya pane yekusimbisa link yatakakutumira iwe.
register.passwordTooShort: Password inofanira kunge iine angangoita 6 mavara

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.descriptionCode: Pinda iyo 6-manhamba kodhi kubva kune yako authenticator app
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Pinda imwe yemakodhi ako ekudzoreredza kuti usayine
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: Ndokumbirawo upinde kodhi yekudzoreredza inoshanda (fomati: XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.helpText: Une dambudziko? Taura nerutsigiro kuti uwane rubatsiro.
twoFactor.invalidCodeError: Kodhi isina kukodzera. Ndokumbirawo uedze zvakare.

setup.subtitle: Ngatigadzirei iwe kumusoro. Ndokumbirawo usarudze account yako kuti uenderere mberi.
setup.clinicDescription: Ini ndinomiririra kiriniki kana chipatara chekurapa chine vanachiremba vazhinji
setup.labDescription: Ini ndinomiririra laboratori yekuongorora kana nzvimbo yekuongororwa
setup.individualDescription: Ndiri muongorori wezvehutano kana muongorori wezvehutano
setup.setupError: Yakakundikana kupedzisa kumisikidza. Ndokumbirawo uedze zvakare.

messages.errorFallback: Yakakundikana kutumira email yekudzoreredza. Ndokumbirawo uedze zvakare.

success.title: Tarisa email yako
success.sentTo: Isu takatumira password yekudzoreredza chinongedzo kune {{email}}
success.description: Ndokumbira utarise inbox yako uye uteedzere mirayiridzo kuti udzorerezve password yako. Link inopera mukati meawa 1.
success.retry: Hauna kugamuchira email yako here? Edza zvakare

form.title: Wakakanganwa password yako?
form.description: Pinda email yako uye isu tinokutumira iwe yekudzoreredza chinongedzo.

messages.errorFallback: Yakakundikana kudzoreredza password. Kubatana kwacho kunogona kunge kwapera.

messages.invalidLink: Invalid confirmation link. Ndokumbirawo ushandise iyi link kubva kune yako email.
messages.errorFallback: Yakakundikana kusimbisa email. Kubatana kwacho kunogona kunge kwapera.

state.loadingDescription: Ndokumbirawo umirire apo isu tichiongorora yako email kero ...
state.errorDescription: Hatina kukwanisa kusimbisa kero yako ye-e-mail.

success.nextStep: Iwe unogona ikozvino kupinda muaccount yako uchishandisa yako email uye password.

error.helpText: Kana izvi zvikaramba zvichiitika, bata rutsigiro kana kunyoresa zvakare.
